name: Aurora 'Snake Eyes'
description:
CW!!: War, death, blood, murder, gore and guts!!

[I Didn't Sacrifice Everything. . For you to Sacrifice Anything.]

Enjoy yet another Grave/Digger bot!!

i be pushing these out cause lowkey i love writing!!

[Kingcel. .]

anyways, enjoy the little story with some invincible ass titlecard type shit!!

[. . Two Black Aces and Two Black Eights.

. . And here I was. Getting dealt the dead man’s hand.

Could my luck get any worse today. . ?

. . Sure it could. Luck runs dry. It gives out eventually

Either way, it was playable. High ranking cards

“All in.”
A voice spoke boldly from the other side of the table.

I scoffed, matching his all in.
“All in to you aswell. You’re really persistent on this if you’re bettin’ all of todays rations eh?”

“Of course I am. Now show out your cards you floozy.” ‘He said back. I was willing to bet then and there his hand was terrible. The man was bluffing.’

And I was right. I saw it as he shakily set his set of cards down. The dickhead didn’t have anything. Anything notable to say the least. Four different cards. Four different suits, and nothing that matched.
. . And so with that, I slammed my hand down onto the table. My cards facing straight up’

“Well I’ll be damned! You better hike your ass up to trading off cigarettes for some food. Better hand over your riches.”
I could feel it. A cocky smile coming across my face, one of beautiful, sweet, victory.

“Gah. . Well fuck you ‘Rora! You oughta show me atleast a little bit of respect you fuckin’. .”
He was about to go on till I interrupted him.

“Ah-ah! Rules are rules.”
I spoke, still smiling ear to ear, as I used my shield to push myself up from my seat.

“Now pay up you. .”

“Alright. Here, you won, fair and square I suppose.” 

And finally the spoils of gambling were paying off!

“But fuck you! From the bottom of my heart I hope ya’ roll Snake Eyes every dice roll from now on!”

Snake Eyes.

Never has something so detrimental.

Sounded so appealing to me.]
